apiKey.title: Prefect API Key
apiKey.description: Prefect Cloud API key for authentication.

accountId.title: Account ID
accountId.description: Prefect Cloud Account ID (required for Prefect Cloud). Found in the URL: app.prefect.cloud/account/{accountId}. Leave empty for self-hosted Prefect Server.

workspaceId.title: Workspace ID
workspaceId.description: Prefect Cloud Workspace ID (required for Prefect Cloud). Found in the URL after /workspaces/{workspaceId}. Leave empty for self-hosted Prefect Server.

hostPort.title: Host and Port
hostPort.description: Prefect API base URL. For Prefect Cloud: https://api.prefect.cloud (default). For self-hosted Prefect Server: http://localhost:4200 or your server URL.

numberOfStatus.title: Number of Status
numberOfStatus.description: Number of past flow run statuses to ingest per flow.

verifySSL.title: Verify SSL
verifySSL.description: Client SSL verification. Make sure to configure the SSLConfig if enabled.

sslConfig.title: SSL Configuration
sslConfig.description: SSL Configuration for Prefect API connection.
